title: ما هو الاكتئاب؟
citation: American Psychiatric Association (2022). Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders (5th ed., text revision). APA Publishing.
content: [CONTENT AUTHOR REQUIRED] Gulf Arabic adaptation (~350 words). Cover: depression — somatic first (الإرهاق، الثقل، فقدان الطاقة) before naming the condition. Normalise gradually. Biological framing. Khaleeji register.
